Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to analyze the logs temporal patterns The user switches between applications frequently but there are logical groupings working on Document1 docx handling email reviewing PDF updating Excel then Quarterly Report docx Each grouping forms a natural case

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For activity naming I should standardize lowlevel actions like FOCUS or TYPING into higherlevel steps like Open Document or Edit Content The SAVE and CLOSE actions are straightforward The email interaction needs careful handling its a separate case since its a distinct task

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case IDs should be documentcentric Document1 docx is the primary case with email and PDF as subtasks within that workflow The Quarterly Report docx is a separate case later Ill use document names as case IDs for clarity

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The explanation must justify the grouping logic temporal proximity application context and task coherence The final event log should flow like a story starting with Document1 branching to email PDF returning to Document1 then closing with Quarterly Report
